allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); delete pkg.dependencies['@types/decimal.js']; delete pkg.dependencies['decimal.js']; pkg.dependencies['decimal.js'] = '^10.4.0'; const fs = require\('fs'\); fs.writeFileSync\('./package.json', JSON.stringify\(pkg, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Fixed package.json'\);")
